author: SypherPK
text:
Win Hide & Seek, Get the Rarest Sprite!
Today I'm hosting a Fortnite Hide & Seek with CourageJD! 
The last player alive will earn the rarest sprite in Season 3- the GALAXY Zero Point Sprite. Enjoy guys!
